introSection: Toboggan Nordique is a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at La Ronde in Montréal, Québec, Canada. It opened on 17 May 2003 as part of a flat ride package.
fullText: Toboggan Nordique is a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at La Ronde in Montréal, Québec, Canada. It opened on 17 May 2003 as part of a flat ride package.
